ideation: This sequence mimics the motion of an airplane taking off and flying.  The arms will move in a coordinated manner, starting with a low-to-the-ground position, rising to simulate ascent, then leveling out to represent sustained flight.  The final frame will show the arms in a position that suggests the airplane is cruising.  The movement will be smooth but decisive, avoiding jerky motions, as each frame is a key position in the gesture.

frames.beat: arms low to the ground, ready for takeoff
arms sweep upwards and outwards, simulating ascent
arms level off, cruising at altitude
arms maintain steady flight, moving forward
